title: Record TUI progress transparency contract
prompt: Create reports/tui-progress-transparency.md with sections for Todo progress bar, Comet spinner, Work transparency, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# TUI Progress Transparency Contract

## Todo progress bar
Todo Board meta shows ratio progress (█░) plus percent done without extra config

## Comet spinner
composing phase uses multi-cell comet trail spinner for denser live motion

## Work transparency
wip/next/done counts stay visible with flow change flashes on the board

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + todo-panel/moon-loader vitest + live TUI board render
